message:
Fix crash loop: encode & in directory names, handle metadata write errors

The daemon was crash-looping because group chat titles containing "&"
(e.g. "+1 617-571-3000 & 3 others") caused Dropbox file coordination
to fail with EDEADLK when writing metadata.json. The sanitize function
now encodes & and # characters. Metadata write failures are also now
non-fatal so a single chat can never take down the daemon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
